current_best.scope: 74-row public-raster overlay subset; P101 target-level evaluator

summary.main_issue: P162 manuscript and P162 table artifacts still describe P160/F1 0.535097 as current best; P168/P165 artifacts supersede them.

required_edits_for_p174: Update manuscript title/status/abstract/conclusion from P160/P161 current-best wording to P165 current-best wording.
Replace paper-facing symbol metric row with P165: precision 0.547570, recall 0.525518, F1 0.536317, center 0.585726, inflation 0.959729.
Keep P160 only as historical progression/baseline row, not current best.
Keep P161 as a P160-style relative guardrail and explicitly state it is not direct P165 cross-dataset generalization evidence.
Preserve expected-json relation replay caveat: relation F1 1.000000 is not runtime model-output robustness.
Add P169 related-work framing: future symbol gains likely need tiled/sliced detector, duplicate suppression, and context-aware selector.
